title: Emissive Hbm's NTM Textures
description: Makes a few textures in Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod glow with shaders
body:
![Block Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5385cbd9ef3ce89b7fc557e8fe3d1fccca8a1800.png)
This pack makes a few textures in [Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod](https://github.com/HbmMods/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT) (and [NTM: Space](https://github.com/JameH2/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT)) emissive.

As of version 2.0, if you are using [Angelica](https://modrinth.com/mod/angelica), shaders aren't required for partial functionality. For full functionality however, you must use shaders that support seusPBR/oldPBR. [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) and [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) are known to work.

I would also recommend using [Shader Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/shader-fixer) along with this, but that's optional.

If you're using Complementary, and you want to use Integrated PBR+ along with this, then in settings, go to Materials → IntegratedPBR+ Materials → Other IPBR+ Features, and switch IPBR+ Emissive Mode to seusPBR > IPBR+.

##

### How to use with Angelica:
On Angelica, using seusPBR with default settings causes visual errors.

If you're using Complementary, a workaround for this is to go in settings, then go to Materials → labPBR/seuspbr Materials, set Normal Map Strength to 0, and disable Parallax Occlusion Mapping.

## 

### Addons:

[Glowing Hbm's NTM Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-hbms-ntm-ores) | Makes NTM ores glow, requires shaders that support seusPBR/oldPBR

## 

If you have any issues or suggestions, then let me know!
